prompt: A vintage film photography portrait of a young Asian woman smiling broadly at the camera. She is leaning forward playfully while holding the handlebars of a bicycle on a sunny neighborhood street. She wears a white short-sleeved t-shirt, a dark blue pleated skirt, white socks, and white sneakers. Her long dark hair blows slightly in the breeze. The bicycle has a front wire basket containing a clear plastic bag of oranges. The background features a paved road, dappled sunlight through trees, and a utility pole, capturing a nostalgic, bright summer day aesthetic.
